Localization.Description: Unix OS files containing command history were read

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: User {object.account.name} read file "{object.name}" containing command history of user {datafield2} using {subject.process.name} on host {event_src.host}
User {object.account.name} read file "{object.name}" containing command history using {subject.process.name} on host {event_src.host}
User with ID {object.account.id} read file "{object.name}" containing command history using {subject.process.name} on host {event_src.host}
User with ID {object.account.id} read file "{object.name}" containing command history of user with ID {numfield2} using {subject.process.name} on host {event_src.host}
